title: tapeinia deusta
intro: Tapeinia deusta, also known as the fiery coral tree, is a plant species native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant contains saponins, which have been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The medicinal properties of Tapeinia deusta have been used to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, providing various health benefits. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
